greetings.goodbye: Sai an jima. Allah ya kiyaye ku.

object_detection.person_detected: Na gano mutum a gaban ku.
object_detection.people_detected: Na gano mutane {count} a gaban ku.
object_detection.vehicle_detected: Na gano mota a gaban ku.
object_detection.obstacle_detected: Akwai abin hani a gaban ku. Ku tsaya.
object_detection.staircase_detected: Na gano matakai. Ku yi hankali.
object_detection.door_detected: Na gano kofa a gaban ku.
object_detection.chair_detected: Na gano kujera a gaban ku.
object_detection.table_detected: Na gano tebur a gaban ku.
object_detection.no_objects: Babu abu na musamman a gaban ku.

ocr.no_text: Babu rubutu da na iya karatu.

navigation.destination_reached: Kun isa wurin ku. Barka da waraka!
navigation.obstacle_ahead: Akwai abin hani a gaban ku. Ku kauce.

face_recognition.unknown_face: Wannan mutumin ba na san shi ba.

emergency.stay_calm: Ku yi hakuri. Taimako yana zuwa.

whatsapp.battery_low: Batirin ya ƙaranciya. Da fatan za a caji.
